name: 16S_primer_515F_V4
description: Conserved 16S primer-binding site '515F_V4' (length 19 bp, E. coli position ~515). Consensus: GTGYCAGCMGCCGCGGTAA. Earth Microbiome Project V4 forward; Parada 2016. Universal across most Bacteria; minimal real-biology mismatch expected — mapper should NOT tolerate high mismatch here.
